= w:en:User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts =

* {{Userscript |doc=User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/copyPageToClipboard |noref=yes}} – Copy the content of the current page or edit form to the system clipboard
* {{Userscript |doc=User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/highlightPiped |noref=yes}} – Fork of [[User:Jeeputer/highlightPiped]] that can be used in User and Drafts namespaces as well as Main
* {{Userscript |doc=User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/SkinSwitcher |noref=yes}} – Fork of [[User:Eizen/SkinSwitcher]] to choose between default desktop skins as of 2024

<!-- vim: set syntax=mediawiki textwidth=0 linebreak spell spelllang=en_au,en_gb: -->
